title: 結果：フラッシュプラン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We use her training plan for today's session.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Every minute went exactly as I planned. Thank
you for going along with it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would liken this feeling to the first time I baked
a cake using a recipe I created myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems this was a great experience for Eishin
Flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the session doesn't go according to
plan...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I knew this result was within the realm
of possibility.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to following your instruction again
for our next session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash never brings up the idea of creating
her own training sessions again after that.
